description: Sorry, sir — Edgelord stepped aside because the right move here was the node, not an edge. The galar-gym-challenge node had already flagged the Macro Cosmos conglomerate as a future-sibling caveat, and wave 24 vision landed both Rose (DAA-168) and Rose Tower (DAA-169) at adjacent within-set collector numbers — the designer-coordinated paired-print of the Chairman and his Wyndon corporate headquarters tower. The corporate-aristocratic villain register completes the three-axis Pokemon-faction-villainy map alongside team-rocket (overt-criminal-syndicate) and team-skull (subculture-coded failed-aspiration). I hope it's not too much trouble. The node is structurally parallel to the future Aether Foundation node and anchors the Pokemon-side corporate-philanthropic-cover-as-actual-apex-villain register.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Rose (Chairman) — three-piece grey suit signature, Champion Cup sponsorship, Eternatus-summoning apex-villain arc]
[Bulbapedia: Rose Tower — Wyndon corporate HQ, executive structure]
[Bulbapedia: Eternatus — Darkest Day final-act battle, Galar Particles weaponization]
[Pokemon Sword & Shield (Game Freak, 2019) — primary canon for Macro Cosmos institutional structure + Act 3 villain reveal]
[PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-168 Rose Supporter + swsh3-169 Rose Tower Stadium, adjacent within-set paired-print]
files_modified: cards/_characters/galar-gym-challenge.md (Caveat resolved + related_characters extended with macro-cosmos)
other_candidates_considered: Solo chairman-rose.md node — rejected; corpus has 1 Rose-specific card (DAA-168), below 3-card solo-node threshold per Bolas-cluster precedent. Surfaced in macro-cosmos.md Caveats as future-sibling-solo with trigger condition: when 3+ Rose-specific corpus cards exist.
Solo oleana.md node — rejected; no Oleana cards in corpus. Trigger condition: when Oleana-affiliated cards enter corpus.

Solo rose-tower.md location node — rejected; the corpus does not yet have a _locations/ layer, and Rose Tower's institutional weight is fully captured at the macro-cosmos parent (the tower IS the conglomerate's signature place). Future _locations/ layer commissioning would split the place anchor out; for now the parent node carries both.
